title: alnus matsumurae
intro: Alnus matsumurae, also known as Japanese alder, is a species of tree in the birch family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alnus matsumurae include reducing fever, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Alnus matsumurae can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory and digestive issues.
